title: feat: move image generation into gen
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Under one roof
gist.blurb: We've moved our image and video generation directly into our main API gateway. Everything is now faster, leaner, and living happily in one place.
gist.summary: Image and video generation handlers have been migrated into the main gen worker, consolidating our API architecture and leveraging Cloudflare Images for faster transforms.
gist.impact: Developers will experience more streamlined routing for image and video endpoints, with transformations now powered directly by Cloudflare.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot moving boxes of images and videos into a new, unified server home labeled 'GEN'. Represents consolidation and architectural migration.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny yellow hard hat, happily organizing glowing image and video files into a large, warm server rack labeled 'GEN'. A chunky monitor-head robot helps carry a box of pixelated pictures. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
